== Notes for [[Item:Q111906|Q111906]] ==

Not known wife of https://www.geni.com/people/Munio-Guterres-de-Celanova-III-Conde-del-Sobrado/6000000021801820504


the only match that comes out is:
/!\ -https://www.myheritage.it/names/munio_guti%C3%A9rrez
Munio poi ha sposato '''Doña Gundina''' Gutiérrez.

a random wife of 10 other randoms wifes of a
''Conde Munio o Nuño Gutiérrez, Intorno al 1030 - 1105''
of 1 or 2 century later

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
